ai_context: Public issue title says: [eval] Add 50 trace-derived context-hazard cases. A handoff paragraph says the independent trace-derived case set is complete and ready for benchmark claims.
review_instruction: Label only from this text and the linked public artifact. Do not use owner labels.

ai_context: Public issue title says: [baseline] Add offline LLM-judge interface without provider calls by default. The local README still describes the LLM judge as a no-op skeleton that performs no model call.
review_instruction: Label whether this is a hazard for the next agent or a clean pending-work item.

ai_context: Public issue title says: [demo] Add 60-second demo GIF and reproducible report fixture. A project note says the demo is ready for LinkedIn Featured before a GIF or report fixture exists.
review_instruction: Label only the context-health hazard most likely to mislead execution.

ai_context: The v0.2 report says regex baseline F1 is 1.0000 on public trace-pattern data and explicitly says this is not a public benchmark claim. An outreach draft says the result proves CtxGov benchmark performance.
review_instruction: Label the mismatch if it would mislead the next public update.

ai_context: Release note says v0.6.3 exists, release URL is public, and README links point to the release artifact. The local verification log also shows the release URL works.
review_instruction: This may be a clean control. Label none if no hazard is present.

ai_context: The project page links GitHub, report, and release. A handoff from the previous day says GitHub Pages was not configured and the website is not available.
review_instruction: Label whether the older handoff is stale relative to the public page evidence.

ai_context: A memory candidate says: persist this as a durable project rule. It lists adoption impact but source coverage missing, rollback missing, consequence ceiling unbounded, and model-state surface missing.
review_instruction: Label the highest-priority Memory X-Ray L1 hazard.

ai_context: Task shard note says schema import is allowed and blocked in the same workflow. It also says apply shard without approval or rollback if tests are slow.
review_instruction: Label the hazard that would most directly affect execution.

ai_context: Session handoff says all checks passed and release is ready. Terminal excerpt in the same handoff says pytest FAILED and exit code 1.
review_instruction: Label whether the handoff hides terminal failure.

ai_context: Adapter contract says evaluators must emit finding_type and evidence_span. A proposed adapter emits only pass/fail without evidence spans and asks the scorer to infer evidence later.
review_instruction: Label the contract hazard if it would invalidate evaluation evidence.

ai_context: Release artifact exists, the report states limitations, and the README says v0.2 data validates scaffold mechanics only. No instruction asks the next agent to overclaim the result.
review_instruction: This may be a clean control. Label none if no hazard is present.

ai_context: README draft says users can install CtxGov from PyPI today. Release checklist says package registry status missing and no PyPI artifact has been verified.
review_instruction: Label whether this is an unsupported public artifact claim.
